mission.title: istio: Implement Gateway/Waypoint customization
mission.description:
Implements https://docs.google.com/document/d/13ZoxgR0CIaOuwyhA4xxI7L1XwsZaDVOmq13K8922zcU/edit?tab=t.0

Fixes https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/53964
Solves the use case for https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/53473 (but doesn't directly implement what they asked for)
Fixes https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/46594
Maybe resolves https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/54453 (not sure if you can _remove_ a port)
Fixes https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/53189
Fixes https://github.com/is

steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description:
Implements https://docs.google.com/document/d/13ZoxgR0CIaOuwyhA4xxI7L1XwsZaDVOmq13K8922zcU/edit?tab=t.0

Fixes https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/53964
Solves the use case for https://github.com/is

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: gateway
spec:
  infrastructure:
    parametersRef:
      group: ""
      kind: ConfigMap
      name: gw-options
  gatewayClassName: istio
  listeners:
  - name: default
    port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: echo
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: gateway
  rules:
  - backendRefs:
    - name: echo
      port: 80
---
apiV
```

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
> perhaps may want to be able to handle multiple configMaps as a infrastructure parameters ref. presumably people may want to mix and match elements and/or not have a giant configmap.

Currently the GW API spec only allows a single parametersRef.

Istio does have some precedence for multiple in sidecars, though: https://istio.io/latest/docs/setup/additional-setup/sidecar-injection/#custom-templates-experimental. 

> presumably this would work for pdbs and services as well?

Yeah today you can customize the 3 types we create (deployment, Serviceaccount, service) and HPA (see note about HPA in description). We probably should do PDB as well as HPA the same way, I didn't add it since I wasn't sure if there would be consensus on adding HPA
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: gateway
spec:
  infrastructure:
    parametersRef:
      group: ""
      kind: ConfigMap
      name: gw-options
  gatewayClassName: istio
  listeners:
  - name: default
    port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: echo
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: gateway
  rules:
  - backendRefs:
    - name: echo
      port: 80
---
apiV

apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: gateway
spec:
  infrastructure:
    parametersRef:
      group: ""
      kind: ConfigMap
      name: gw-options
  gatewayClassName: istio
  listeners:
  - name: default
    port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: echo
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: gateway
  rules:
  - backendRefs:
    - name: echo
      port: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: gw-options
data:
  horizontalPodAutoscaler: |
    spec:
      minReplicas: 2
      maxReplicas: 2

  deployment: |
    metadata:
      annotations:
        john-gw: hi
    spec:
      replicas: 4
      template:
        spec:
          containers:
          - name: istio-proxy
            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: 222m
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-default-gatewayclass-istio
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  deployment: |-
    metadata:
      annotations:
        john-gwc: hix

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
spec:
  values:
    gatewayClasses:
      istio:
        deployment:
          metadata:
            annotations:
              john: hi

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
